name: Salsa Sencilla Para Tostadas y Tacos
recipeIngredient: 2 small Hot Green Chili Peppers, seeds removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomato sauce, chopped hot green chili peppers (seeds and membrane removed), olive oil, vinegar, oregano, cumin powder, and salt in a bowl.
2. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are blended and well combined.
